messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'onReady'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'onReady' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [onReady]

); export default CorporateSection;

import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { GraduationCap, Mail, Phone, MapPin, Facebook, Twitter, Linkedin, Instagram, ArrowRight } from 'lucide-react'; import { useModal } from '../../context/ModalContext'; import { BRANDING } from '../../data/branding'; import { useTheme } from '../../context/ThemeContext'; import { MicroExpander } from '../ui/MicroExpander'; import { courses } from '../../data/courses'; import { m } from 'framer-motion'; const Footer = () => { const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear(); const { openModal } = useModal(); const { theme } = useTheme(); return (
{/* Institute Info */}

{BRANDING.description}

} className="bg-primary/5 border-none text-primary hover:bg-[#1877F2] hover:text-[var(--text-on-inverted)]" href={BRANDING.socials.facebook} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" /> } className="bg-primary/5 border-none text-primary hover:bg-[#1DA1F2] hover:text-[var(--text-on-inverted)]" href={BRANDING.socials.twitter} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" />
} className="bg-primary/5 border-none text-primary hover:bg-[#0A66C2] hover:text-[var(--text-on-inverted)]" href={BRANDING.socials.linkedin} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" /> } className="bg-primary/5 border-none text-primary hover:bg-[#E4405F] hover:text-[var(--text-on-inverted)]" href={BRANDING.socials.instagram} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" />
{/* Quick Links */}

Quick Links

  • About Us
  • All Courses
  • Career Support
  • Admissions
  • Student Reviews
  • Contact Us
  • FAQs
  • Our Trainers
  • Join as Trainer
{/* Top Courses */}

Popular Programs

    {courses.slice(0, 6).map(c => (
  • {c.title}
    • ))}
  • View All Programs
{/* Contact Info */}

Get In Touch

  • {BRANDING.address}
  • {BRANDING.phone}
  • {BRANDING.email}
{/* Certification Badge */}
Industry-Recognized Certificates

Verifiable digital certificates recognized by top hiring companies

{/* Bottom Bar */}

© {currentYear} {BRANDING.fullName}. All rights reserved.

Privacy Terms NDA Refunds Trainer Conduct Disclaimer
Next Batch Starting Soon openModal()} className="btn-primary px-5 py-2 text-small focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[var(--accent-primary)]" aria-label="Enroll Today" > Enroll Today
); }; export default Footer;

// ─── Tier-Based Course Data (Brochure-Exact) ───────────────────────────────
// Source: /src/assets/scope ai syllabus and broucher.html
// 10 Programs · 3 Tiers · All content matches brochure 1:1

export const TIERS = ['Beginner', 'Intermediate', 'Advanced'];

export const tierMeta = {
  Beginner: {
    label: 'Tier 1 – Beginner',
    heading: 'Build Your AI Foundation',
    description: 'Perfect starting point for freshers and non-tech professionals looking to enter the world of AI with zero prior experience required.',
    color: '#16A34A',
    softBg: 'rgba(22,163,74,0.06)',
    borderColor: 'rgba(22,163,74,0.18)',
    emoji: '🟢',
  },
  Intermediate: {
    label: 'Tier 2 – Intermediate',
    heading: 'Go Deeper, Build More',
    description: 'For those with basic programming or data knowledge ready to tackle real AI systems, deep learning models, and specialized applications.',
    color: '#F97316',
    softBg: 'rgba(249,115,22,0.06)',
    borderColor: 'rgba(249,115,22,0.18)',
    emoji: '🟠',
  },
  Advanced: {
    label: 'Tier 3 – Advanced',
    heading: 'Lead. Deploy. Govern.',
    description: 'For experienced AI practitioners ready to scale models into production and ensure AI is built responsibly and sustainably.',
    color: '#7C3AED',
    softBg: 'rgba(124,58,237,0.06)',
    borderColor: 'rgba(124,58,237,0.18)',
    emoji: '🟣',
  },
};

const generateSlug = (title) =>
  title
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s-]/g, '')
    .replace(/\s+/g, '-')
    .replace(/-+/g, '-')
    .trim();

export const courses = [
  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════
  // BEGINNER TIER (Programs 01, 02, 05, 08)
  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════
  {
    id: 'generative-ai-prompt-engineering',
    slug: 'generative-ai-prompt-engineering',
    tier: 'Beginner',

    title: 'Generative AI & Prompt Engineering',
    tagline: 'Master the world\'s most in-demand AI skill. Learn to work with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Midjourney like a professional.',
    duration: '6 Weeks',
    salaryRange: '3 – 7 LPA',
    modules: [
      { code: 'M01', title: 'Introduction to Generative AI & Large Language Models' },
      { code: 'M02', title: 'Prompt Design Principles – Zero-shot, Few-shot, Chain-of-thought' },
      { code: 'M03', title: 'ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini – Advanced Use Cases' },
      { code: 'M04', title: 'AI Image Generation – Midjourney, DALL·E, Stable Diffusion' },
      { code: 'M05', title: 'AI Tools for Productivity – Notion AI, Copilot, Perplexity' },
      { code: 'M06', title: 'Prompt Engineering for Business & Content Creation' },
      { code: 'M07', title: 'Building AI Workflows & Automation with No-Code Tools' },
      { code: 'M08', title: 'Ethics, Limitations & Responsible AI Use' },

      { icon: '✍️', title: 'AI Content Strategist' },

      { icon: '📢', title: 'Generative AI Trainer' },

  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════
  // INTERMEDIATE TIER (Programs 03, 04, 06, 07)
  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════
  {

      { code: 'M07', title: 'Model Monitoring – Drift Detection, Performance Tracking' },
      { code: 'M08', title: 'LLMOps – Deploying & Scaling Large Language Models' },
      { code: 'M09', title: 'AutoML & Pipeline Automation' },
      { code: 'M10', title: 'Capstone: Deploy a Full ML System on Cloud' },
    ],
    whoCanLearn: [
      'Data Scientists', 'ML Engineers', 'DevOps Professionals',
      'Backend Developers', 'Cloud Engineers', 'Senior AI Practitioners',
    ],
    prerequisites: [
      'Completed Python for AI & ML + ML & Deep Learning courses',
      'Familiarity with Linux command line',
      'Basic understanding of cloud computing concepts',
      'Experience deploying at least one ML model',
    ],
    roles: [
      { icon: '⚙️', title: 'MLOps Engineer' },
      { icon: '☁️', title: 'AI Cloud Architect' },
      { icon: '🔧', title: 'ML Infrastructure Engineer' },
      { icon: '🚀', title: 'AI Platform Engineer' },
      { icon: '📡', title: 'LLMOps Specialist' },
      { icon: '🏗️', title: 'Senior Data Engineer' },
    ],
  },
  {
    id: 'ai-ethics-governance-prompt-safety',
    slug: 'ai-ethics-governance-prompt-safety',
    tier: 'Advanced',

    title: 'AI Ethics, Governance & Prompt Safety',
    tagline: 'The fastest-growing niche in enterprise AI. Learn to build fair, explainable, safe, and compliant AI systems that organizations and regulators demand.',
    duration: '8 Weeks',
    salaryRange: '10 – 22 LPA',
    modules: [
      { code: 'M01', title: 'Foundations of AI Ethics – Bias, Fairness, Transparency' },
      { code: 'M02', title: 'AI Regulatory Landscape – EU AI Act, India DPDP Bill, GDPR' },
      { code: 'M03', title: 'Explainable AI (XAI) – LIME, SHAP, Model Interpretability' },
      { code: 'M04', title: 'AI Bias Detection & Mitigation Techniques' },
      { code: 'M05', title: 'Prompt Safety – Jailbreaks, Injections, Red-Teaming' },
      { code: 'M06', title: 'AI Governance Frameworks & Risk Assessment' },
      { code: 'M07', title: 'Responsible AI in Healthcare, Finance & Public Sector' },
      { code: 'M08', title: 'Building an AI Ethics Policy for Organizations' },
    ],
    whoCanLearn: [
      'AI/ML Practitioners', 'Legal & Compliance Officers', 'Policy Makers',
      'Product Managers', 'Senior IT Leaders', 'Risk Analysts', 'HR & Diversity Officers',
    ],
    prerequisites: [
      'Basic understanding of AI/ML concepts',
      'Awareness of data privacy principles',
      'No heavy coding required for this program',
      'Interest in policy, governance, or responsible tech',
    ],
    roles: [
      { icon: '⚖️', title: 'AI Ethics Officer' },
      { icon: '🛡️', title: 'AI Risk & Compliance Manager' },
      { icon: '📜', title: 'AI Policy Analyst' },
      { icon: '🔍', title: 'Responsible AI Auditor' },
      { icon: '🏢', title: 'AI Governance Consultant' },
      { icon: '🌐', title: 'AI Trust & Safety Specialist' },
    ],
  },
];

// Group courses by tier for easy access
export const coursesByTier = TIERS.reduce((acc, tier) => {
  acc[tier] = courses.filter((c) => c.tier === tier);
  return acc;
}, {});

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'drawFrame'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [sectionRef, canvasRef, drawFrame]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'canvasRef', 'framePath', and 'startRafLoop'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'framePath' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [totalFrames, reducedMotion, startRafLoop, framePath, canvasRef]

import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import Layout from '../components/layout/Layout'; import { Target, Eye, Lightbulb, Users, ShieldCheck, Heart, ArrowRight, Award, Code2, Zap, MessageSquare, Briefcase, Brain, Database, Cloud, Cpu, BarChart3, Bot, GraduationCap, MapPin, Phone, ExternalLink, BookOpen } from 'lucide-react'; import { useModal } from '../context/ModalContext'; import { BRANDING } from '../data/branding'; import SEO from '../components/utils/SEO'; import Hero from '../components/ui/Hero'; import KineticTeamHybrid from '../components/ui/KineticTeamHybrid'; import HiringPartners from '../components/home/HiringPartners'; import LottieAnimation from '../components/ui/LottieAnimation'; import visionAnimation from '../assets/animations/Vision Eye.json'; import missionAnimation from '../assets/animations/Mission.json'; import { FadeIn, StaggerContainer, StaggerItem, ScaleOnHover, ScrollCountUp, Parallax } from '../components/utils/Animations'; import { m } from 'framer-motion'; import { useScrollReveal } from '../hooks/useScrollReveal'; import { fadeUp } from '../utils/motionVariants'; const About = () => { const { openModal } = useModal(); const { ref: ctaRef, isVisible: ctaVisible } = useScrollReveal(); const stats = [ { label: 'Year Founded', value: 2019, suffix: '' }, { label: 'Students Trained', value: 1200, suffix: '+' }, { label: 'Real Projects Built', value: 157, suffix: '+' }, { label: 'Hiring Partners', value: 75, suffix: '+' }, { label: 'Avg Trainer Experience', value: 8, suffix: '+ Years' }, { label: 'Max Batch Size', value: 20, suffix: '' }, { label: 'Chennai Campuses', value: 3, suffix: '' }, { label: 'Placement Rate', value: 90, suffix: '%+' }, ]; const locations = [ { name:"Nungambakkam Campus", address:"No. 12, Wallace Garden, 2nd Street, Nungambakkam, Chennai — 600006", map:"https://maps.google.com/?q=Scope+AI+Hub+Nungambakkam+Chennai", phone: BRANDING.phone, type:"Flagship Campus" }, { name:"Velachery Campus", address:"No. 45, Velachery Main Road, Near Phoenix Mall, Velachery, Chennai — 600042", map:"https://maps.google.com/?q=Scope+AI+Hub+Velachery+Chennai", phone: BRANDING.phone, type:"South Chennai Hub" }, { name:"OMR Campus", address:"3rd Floor, Tech Park, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Sholinganallur, Chennai — 600119", map:"https://maps.google.com/?q=Scope+AI+Hub+OMR+Sholinganallur+Chennai", phone: BRANDING.phone, type:"IT Corridor Center" }, { name:"Online & Pan-India Programs", address:"Live online batches available for students across India and abroad. Flexible weekend and weekday schedules.", map:"#", type:"Online & Offline" } ]; const values = [ { icon: , title:"Integrity", description:"We commit to transparency, honesty, and delivering measurable outcomes — not empty promises." }, { icon: , title:"Accountability", description:"We take ownership of learner success and stand by our commitment to real career outcomes." }, { icon: , title:"Leadership", description:"We cultivate confidence, discipline, and the mindset required to lead in the AI era." }, { icon: , title:"Community", description:"Students first, always. We build a supportive ecosystem where every learner thrives together." } ]; return ( Where AI Careers Are Built — One Real Project at a Time} subtitle="Scope AI Hub is Chennai's leading AI & Machine Learning training institute empowering students and professionals with hands-on industry skills since 2019. Online and offline programs available." >
Explore Programs openModal()} className="btn-secondary text-body-lg px-8 py-4 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[var(--accent-primary)]" aria-label="Apply for AI course admission" > Apply Now
{/* Vision & Mission */}
{/* Ambient background decoration */}

Our Vision

To build a globally recognised AI learning ecosystem that elevates the next generation of intelligent innovators and technology leaders.

Our Mission

To provide practical, industry-grade AI education that converts ambition into measurable career outcomes.

{/* Founding Story Section */}
Our Founding Story

Why We Built SCOPE AI HUB

Scope AI Hub was founded in 2019 with a single conviction: AI education in India was broken.

Institutions were teaching theory while the industry demanded engineers who could build and deploy real AI systems.

We replaced passive lectures with project execution, mentor-led code reviews, and real engineering simulations.

"I watched brilliant students spend years studying AI theory, only to fail their first real deployment. That's when I knew — the system had to change. {BRANDING.fullName} exists because I refused to let another batch of students graduate unprepared."

— {BRANDING.founder.name}, {BRANDING.founder.title}

"This is more than an institute. It is a movement to build the next generation of AI professionals."

{BRANDING.founder.name}

{BRANDING.founder.title}

2019
Year Founded
1,200+
Students Trained
{/* Stats Section */}
{stats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.suffix}
{stat.label}
 ))}
{/* Why We're Different */}

The Scope Advantage

Six reasons our graduates outperform the competition — and why 75+ companies trust us to build their AI talent pipeline.

{[ { title:"Project-First Learning", desc:"Every module is anchored around a real AI project. Students graduate with 10+ deployable projects in their portfolio.", icon: }, { title:"Industry-Current Curriculum", desc:"Our syllabus is updated monthly by active AI practitioners to match real job market demands and emerging technologies.", icon: }, { title:"Small Batch Sizes", desc:"Each batch is capped at 20 students to ensure direct mentor interaction, personalized feedback, and no student is left behind.", icon: }, { title:"Lifetime Learning Access", desc:"Once enrolled, you get lifetime access to our learning portal, recorded sessions, and every future curriculum update.", icon: }, { title:"Multilingual Support (தமிழ் + తెలుగు + English)", desc:"Complex AI concepts explained in Tamil, Telugu, and English — ensuring no student is left behind due to language barriers.", icon: }, { title:"Career-Ready Focus", desc:"Weekly mock interviews, resume reviews, and direct referrals to 75+ hiring partners. We prepare you for the job, not just the exam.", icon: } ].map((item, i) => (
{item.icon}

{item.title}

{item.desc}

))}
{/* Philosophy */}

How We Teach

Every class at Scope AI Hub is a collaborative engineering session.

Our trainers open their code editor and solve real problems alongside students. You debug, build, and deploy systems in real time — just like a real AI engineering team.

{[ 'Curriculum updated every month by active industry practitioners.', 'Project-based learning from day one — 10+ deployable projects by graduation.', 'Mentors with 8+ years of industry experience who code with you, not at you.', ].map((item, i) => (

{item}

))}

Innovation in every lesson.

Goal-oriented training.

{/* Technologies We Cover */}
Curriculum Stack

Technologies We Cover

Industry-standard tools and frameworks taught through hands-on projects and live deployments.

{[ { name: 'Python', icon: }, { name: 'Machine Learning', icon: }, { name: 'Deep Learning', icon: }, { name: 'NLP', icon: }, { name: 'Computer Vision', icon: }, { name: 'Generative AI', icon: }, { name: 'Large Language Models', icon: }, { name: 'Prompt Engineering', icon: }, { name: 'Data Analytics', icon: }, { name: 'Cloud AI (AWS / GCP / Azure)', icon: }, ].map((tech, i) => (
{tech.icon}

{tech.name}

 ))}
{/* Hiring Partners */} {/* CEO Leadership Section */}
{/* Left: Minimalist Avatar/Graphic */}
{/* Decorative geometric background elements */}
{/* Main Avatar Container */}
PR {/* Subtle inner gradient */}
{/* Right: Editorial Typography */}
Leadership

{BRANDING.ceo.name}

{BRANDING.ceo.title}

{/* Decorative large quote mark */} "

{BRANDING.ceo.bio}

{["Strategic Vision","AI & Tech Leadership","Academic Excellence","Industry Alignment"].map((tag, i) => ( {tag} ))}
{/* Team Section — Interactive Kinetic List */}
{/* Student Success */}
Student Success

From Beginners to AI Engineers

Real career transformations from our graduates — not marketing claims, but verified outcomes.

{[ { name: 'Arun Kumar', beforeRole: 'Mechanical Graduate', afterRole: 'ML Engineer', company: 'Zoho', logo: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/zoho.com', quote: 'SCOPE AI HUB transformed my career. The hands-on projects gave me the confidence to crack my interview at Zoho.', }, { name: 'Priya Sharma', beforeRole: 'IT Support Analyst', afterRole: 'Data Scientist', company: 'Freshworks', logo: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/freshworks.com', quote:"The mentors at SCOPE AI HUB don't just teach — they build with you. That changed everything for me.", }, { name: 'Karthik Rajan', beforeRole: 'BCA Graduate', afterRole: 'AI Developer', company: 'Infosys', logo: 'https://logo.clearbit.com/infosys.com', quote: 'From zero coding experience to deploying AI models in production. The curriculum is intense and industry-ready.', }, ].map((student, i) => (
{student.name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('')}

{student.name}

{student.beforeRole} → {student.afterRole}

"{student.quote}"

{student.company}
))}
{/* Core Values */}

The Values We Live By

As a startup, our values define our culture and our commitment to our students.

{values.map((value, index) => (
{value.icon}

{value.title}

{value.description}

))}
{/* Our Presence Section */}

Our Presence

On-campus excellence. Borderless online learning. A truly global AI ecosystem — from Tamil Nadu to the world.

))}
{/* CTA Section */}

Your Next Batch Starts Soon. Seats Fill Fast.

import React from 'react'; import { useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'; import Layout from '../components/layout/Layout'; import ContactForm from '../components/ui/ContactForm'; import { Mail, Phone, MapPin, Clock, Facebook, Twitter, Linkedin, Instagram } from 'lucide-react'; import { useModal } from '../context/ModalContext'; import { m } from 'framer-motion'; import { useScrollReveal } from '../hooks/useScrollReveal'; import { fadeUp, staggerContainer, staggerItem } from '../utils/motionVariants'; import SEO from '../components/utils/SEO'; import Hero from '../components/ui/Hero'; import { BRANDING } from '../data/branding'; const Contact = () => { const { openModal } = useModal(); const { ref: leftRef, isVisible: leftVisible } = useScrollReveal(); const { ref: rightRef, isVisible: rightVisible } = useScrollReveal(); const location = useLocation(); const queryParams = new URLSearchParams(location.search); const initialCourse = queryParams.get('course') ||"General Inquiry"; return ( Let's Talk.} />
{/* Left Column: Information */}

Contact Information

We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question about courses, pricing, or just want to say hello, our team is ready to answer all your questions.

Visit Us

{BRANDING.address}

Call Us

{BRANDING.phone}

Mon–Sun, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

Email Us

{BRANDING.email}

We'll respond within 24 hours.

 {/* Office Hours Box */}

Office Hours

Monday - Friday 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
Saturday 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
Sunday 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM
{/* Socials */}

Follow Us

{[ { icon: , link: BRANDING.socials.facebook, color: '#1877F2' }, { icon: , link: BRANDING.socials.twitter, color: '#1DA1F2' }, { icon: , link: BRANDING.socials.linkedin, color: '#0A66C2' }, { icon: , link: BRANDING.socials.instagram, color: '#E4405F' } ].map((social, i) => ( e.currentTarget.style.backgroundColor = social.color} onMouseLeave={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.backgroundColor = 'transparent'} > {social.icon} ))}
{/* Right Column: Contact Form */}

Send us a message

Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.

{/* Quick FAQs */}

Quick Answers

Do you offer weekend batches?

Yes, we have dedicated weekend batches designed specifically for working professionals.

Is job placement guaranteed?

We provide extensive placement assistance, portfolio building, and mock interviews to ensure you are job-ready.
{/* Full Width Map */}
); }; export default Contact;
